title: Bikanervala Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bikanervala Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bikanervala Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
